zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Marie Calvert於1542年出生在英國艾可費爾斯泰德時，她的父親Sir George John Calvert17歲，母親Dorothy Lennard15歲。她於1560年1月12日與Thomas Porter I在英國英格蘭藍卡爾吉可哈姆結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1616年8月19日在英國艾可蕾托 巴多福享年74歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦特查阿培爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Marie Calvert于1542年出生在英国艾可費爾斯泰德时，她的父亲Sir George John Calvert17岁，母亲Dorothy Lennard15岁。她于1560年1月12日与Thomas Porter I在英国英格兰藍卡爾吉可哈姆结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1616年8月19日在英国艾可蕾托 巴多福享年74岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦特查阿培爾。

nameMeanings.name: Calvert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): occupational name from Middle English calfhirde, from Old English (Anglian) calf ‘calf’ + hierde ‘herdsman’.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Marie Calvert was born in 1542, in Felsted, Essex, England, her father, Sir George John Calvert, was 17 and her mother, Dorothy Lennard, was 15. She married Thomas Porter I on 12 January 1560, in Kirkham, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 19 August 1616, in Little Baddow, Essex, England, at the age of 74, and was buried in Whitechapel, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Marie Calvert est née en 1542, à Felsted, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir George John Calvert, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Dorothy Lennard, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Porter I le 12 janvier 1560, à Kirkham, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 août 1616, à Little Baddow, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Whitechapel, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Marie Calvert 1542 in Felsted, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir George John Calvert 17 und ihre Mutter Dorothy Lennard 15. Sie hat am 12. Januar 1560 in Kirkham, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Thomas Porter I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. August 1616 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Little Baddow, Essex, England und wurde in Whitechapel, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Marie Calvert è nata il nel 1542 nel Felsted, Essex, England, sua padre, Sir George John Calvert, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Dorothy Lennard, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Porter I il 12 gennaio 1560, nel Kirkham, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 19 agosto 1616, nel Little Baddow, Essex, England, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolta a Whitechapel, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Marie Calvertが1542年にイギリスエセックスフエルステドで生まれた時，父Sir George John Calvertは17歳，母Dorothy Lennardは15歳であった。1560年1月12日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアキルクハムでThomas Porter Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1616年8月19日にイギリスエセックスリットル バッドオウで74歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンウィテチャペルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Marie Calvert(이)가 1542년 영국 에세스 프스테드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir George John Calvert(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dorothy Lennard(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1560년 1월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 커카에서 Thomas Porter I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1616년 8월 19일 영국 에세스 리틀 바도에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 휘테차플에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Marie Calvert nasceu em 1542, em Felsted, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir George John Calvert, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Dorothy Lennard, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Porter I em 12 de janeiro de 1560, em Kirkham, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de agosto de 1616, em Little Baddow, Essex, Inglaterra, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em Whitechapel, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Little Baddow, Chelmsford, Essex, Englan: Little Baddow, Essex, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Marie Calvert родилась в 1542 г. в местности фелстед, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir George John Calvert было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Dorothy Lennard, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Porter I 12 января 1560 г. в местности кирхам, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 19 августа 1616 г. в местности литл баддоу, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности уитечапел, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Marie Calvert nació en 1542, en Felsted, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir George John Calvert, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Dorothy Lennard, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Thomas Porter I el 12 de enero de 1560, en Kirkham, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 19 de agosto de 1616, en Little Baddow, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultada en Whitechapel, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
